pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Security & Platform Strategy KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.44) to justify inclusion for the Data and AI Transformation Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world Data and AI Transformation Lead roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Security & Platform Strategy is not a standard competency expectation for Data and AI Transformation Lead. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Data and AI Transformation Lead competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.44) and edge-domain placement (Security & Platform Strategy) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Data and AI Transformation Lead. All passes support exclusion.
